info.name: EduVerse API - Complete Test Collection
info.description:
Comprehensive API test collection for all EduVerse endpoints.

Test Accounts (ALL use password: SecureP@ss123):
- Admin: admin.tarek@example.com
- Instructor: instructor.tarek@example.com
- Student: student.tarek@example.com
- TA: ta.tarek@example.com
- IT Admin: it_admin.tarek@example.com

Run the "Authentication" folder first to populate tokens.

exec: pm.test("Status 200 or 401 (token may not be valid)", () => pm.expect([200,401]).to.include(pm.response.code));

body.raw:
{
  "name": "API Dog Test Course",
  "code": "TEST101",
  "departmentId": 1,
  "description": "Test course from API Dog",
  "credits": 3,
  "level": "FRESHMAN"
}

{
  "title": "API Dog Test Material",
  "materialType": "document",
  "description": "Created by API Dog test",
  "weekNumber": 1,
  "isPublished": true
}

exec: pm.test("Pagination meta", () => { var m = pm.response.json().meta; pm.expect(m).to.have.property("total"); pm.expect(m).to.have.property("page"); pm.expect(m).to.have.property("limit"); pm.expect(m).to.have.property("totalPages"); });

body.raw:
{
  "courseId": 1,
  "groupName": "Math Wizards",

  "maxMembers": 10,
  "isPublic": true
}
